title: Single-bit signal changed when used as input of another assignment

features.name: ternary_operator_width_mismatch
features.description: Code should include a ternary operator where the true branch is a multi-bit wire (8 bits) and the false branch is a single-bit literal, with the result assigned to a 1-bit output

features.name: ternary_condition_width_promotion
features.description: Code should include a ternary operator where the condition is a multi-bit value derived from a reduction operation, used to select between a wider signal and a 1-bit literal
